title: stelis norae
intro: Stelis norae, a type of orchid species, is a flowering plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Stelis norae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the severity of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
